race.comment: REMADOSI (3) never featured fresh before tackling a Heavy deck at the midweeks last time out. Back to a more suitable race this time around for Krogh and she's placed at this track and trip before. Can get back to something like her best form which will see her hard to beat with a favourable set-up. WEBEJAMIN (5) kicked strongly from the front last start when going from 1400m to 1900m in a good performance third-up. Back to 1750m now is no issue and if she finds the front again, she'll be hard to run down. OLIVIA MIA (14) finished off strongly last start here over 1280m and rises up in trip now. While this is the first time beyond a mile, there's enough there to suggest it's a positive at this point of the campaign. Leading chance. PERUNO (10) is better than he showed last time out and can't be discounted. HARDAZHELL (8) is worth including on his recent efforts.
